rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes when concrete bounds are provided
Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scopes
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports belong in component type scopes
Constants and equation declarations are typically placed in component type annexes
Implementation-level bindings like assign statements go in implementation scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume/guarantee labels with colons and semicolons
Use eq for equation declarations and const for constant declarations
Assign statements must reference valid output features or auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
